title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch using modern tools and best practices.

title: Advanced React & Next.js
description: Build high-performance web apps with React, Next.js, and server-side rendering.

title: UI/UX Design Fundamentals
description: Master the basics of user interface and user experience design.

title: Figma for Designers
description: Design modern interfaces and prototypes using Figma.

title: Python for Data Analysis
description: Analyze and visualize data using Python, Pandas, and Matplotlib.

title: Machine Learning Basics
description: Understand core machine learning concepts and algorithms.

title: Cybersecurity Essentials
description: Learn how to protect systems and data from common security threats.

title: Network Security & Firewalls
description: Understand network vulnerabilities and how to secure infrastructure.

title: JavaScript Deep Dive
description: Master closures, prototypes, async programming, and performance.

title: Responsive Web Design
description: Create mobile-first, responsive layouts using modern CSS techniques.

title: Data Visualization with Python
description: Present data insights clearly using charts and visual tools.

title: Ethical Hacking Introduction
description: Learn penetration testing and ethical hacking fundamentals.
